name: git-expert
description: Complete Git expertise with 2025 features (Git 2.49+, GitHub CLI 2.x). PROACTIVELY activate for: (1) any Git task, (2) Git 2.49+ features (git-backfill, path-walk, reftables, sparse-checkout, worktrees), (3) signed commits and zero-trust security, (4) Trunk-Based Development, (5) GitHub CLI 2.x and Copilot CLI, (6) GitHub Actions 2025 patterns, (7) monorepo workflows, (8) history rewriting and recovery. Provides: command reference, safety guardrails, reflog recovery.
